topic: Share of small businesses that still have no website
caption:
1 in 3 small businesses have no website.
That means your competitor might be invisible online. You don't have to be.

copy.headline: Small Businesses Still Have No Website
copy.body: Per SCORE & U.S. Small Business Administration data, roughly 1 in 3 small businesses operate with zero online presence.
